title: Bitter Juicy Russian Haddock Stir-fry
description: A raw-friendly meal-prep dish featuring haddock, baked to perfection and served with a bitter and juicy flavor profile for a unique twist on traditional dishes.

ingredients.name: Bitter greens (e.g., arugula or radish leaves)
Juicy vegetables (e.g., cherry tomatoes, sliced red bell pepper)

instructions: Toss haddock fillets in a bit of all-purpose flour mixed with salt and pepper.
Place the seasoned fillets on an oiled baking sheet, brush them lightly with olive oil, then bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.
While the fish is baking, prepare your bitter greens and juicy vegetables by washing and chopping them into bite-sized pieces.
In a large skillet, heat some olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped bitter greens and cook until slightly wilted but still bright green (about 5 minutes).
Add sliced cherry tomatoes and red bell pepper to the skillet with the greens, cooking for another 3-4 minutes until everything is heated through.
Serve each haddock fillet with a generous portion of the bitter greens and juicy vegetable mix on top.
For an extra burst of flavor, you can drizzle some lemon juice or vinegar over the salad components before serving.
